cluster_plan.label: Creator Growth Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring creator growth, packaging, monetization, repurposing, and audience-building loops.

cluster_plan.label: Gaming / NPC / Community Worlds
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring gaming, NPC, modding, streamer, and fan-community loops with strong social spread.

cluster_plan.label: AI Agent Builders
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring agent building, orchestration, eval, workflow automation, and tool-composition loops.

cluster_plan.label: Startup Builder Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring startup validation, GTM, fundraising, and founder operating loops.

cluster_plan.label: Builder Productivity Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring shipping, planning, coordination, focus, and execution loops for ambitious builders.

cluster_plan.label: Career / Status / Social Proof
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring reputation, hiring, interview, resume, portfolio, and status-building loops.

cluster_plan.label: Consumer Agent Utilities
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring life-admin, shopping, travel, local decision, and personal coordination loops.

cluster_plan.label: Crypto / DeFi / Trading
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring crypto trading, onchain research, portfolio ops, DeFi strategy, and token intelligence loops.

cluster_plan.label: X-Native Persona Tools
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring X-native posting, idea capture, reply games, clout loops, and identity-building tools.

cluster_plan.label: Design / Remix / Aesthetics
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring design remixing, visual identity, aesthetics, style-transfer, and show-off loops.

cluster_plan.label: Education / Skill Acceleration
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring skill-building, tutoring, practice, and accelerated-learning loops.

cluster_plan.label: Health / Fitness / Self Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring self-improvement, fitness, tracking, accountability, and coaching loops.

cluster_plan.label: Dating / Social Signal
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring dating, messaging, social confidence, and relationship-ops loops.

cluster_plan.label: Ecommerce / Merchant Growth
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring merchant growth, merchandising, storefront optimization, and retention loops.

cluster_plan.label: Local Discovery / Experiences
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring local recommendations, events, outings, experiences, and city-exploration loops.

cluster_plan.label: Fandom / Collectibles / Communities
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring fandom, collectibles, niche community, and identity-market loops.

cluster_plan.label: Finance / Money Ops
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring budgeting, saving, spending, and money-management loops for individuals.

cluster_plan.label: Developer Distribution Tools
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring developer growth, launch, docs, community, and distribution loops.

cluster_packets.focus: Recurring creator growth, packaging, monetization, repurposing, and audience-building loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Creator Growth Systems. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring creator growth, packaging, monetization, repurposing, and audience-building loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Creator Idea Sprint Loop
raw_candidates.description: A rapid loop for turning creator signals into fresh post, clip, or product concepts before momentum fades.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated creator idea sprint loop workflow inside the creator growth systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Creator Idea Sprint Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next creator idea sprint loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Creators on X and short-form platforms keep needing new angles faster than their manual ideation process can sustain.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Creators on X and short-form platforms keep needing new angles faster than their manual ideation process can sustain.

raw_candidates.label: Distribution Repack Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for repacking one core idea into multiple distribution-native formats across X, shorts, threads, and newsletters.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated distribution repack loop workflow inside the creator growth systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Distribution Repack Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next distribution repack loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Good creators rarely fail because of idea scarcity alone; they fail to reshape winning ideas into enough surfaces.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Good creators rarely fail because of idea scarcity alone; they fail to reshape winning ideas into enough surfaces.

raw_candidates.label: Agentic Lead Triage Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for ingesting inbound lead signals, enriching context, and routing the next best follow-up action.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated agentic lead triage loop workflow inside the ai agent builders wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Agentic Lead Triage Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next agentic lead triage loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Founders and operators keep losing speed because inbound opportunities arrive noisily and get handled inconsistently.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Founders and operators keep losing speed because inbound opportunities arrive noisily and get handled inconsistently.

raw_candidates.label: Launch Checklist Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for coordinating recurring launch readiness tasks across copy, product, support, and distribution surfaces.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated launch checklist loop workflow inside the startup builder systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Launch Checklist Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next launch checklist loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Every launch repeats the same coordination pain, especially in lean teams without dedicated operations staff.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Every launch repeats the same coordination pain, especially in lean teams without dedicated operations staff.

raw_candidates.label: Deal Desk Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for pricing questions, packaging tradeoffs, approval logic, and follow-up in small sales motions.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated deal desk loop workflow inside the startup builder systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Deal Desk Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next deal desk loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Founders repeatedly improvise deal decisions, which creates inconsistency and lost learning.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Founders repeatedly improvise deal decisions, which creates inconsistency and lost learning.

raw_candidates.label: Daily Signal Digest Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for aggregating key updates, weak signals, and action-worthy changes into a daily operating brief.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated daily signal digest loop workflow inside the builder productivity systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Daily Signal Digest Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next daily signal digest loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Operators drown in streams of updates and need compressed decision-ready signal, not more dashboards.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Operators drown in streams of updates and need compressed decision-ready signal, not more dashboards.

Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Build Log to Distribution Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for converting changelogs and internal progress into public-facing distribution assets.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated build log to distribution loop workflow inside the builder productivity systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Build Log to Distribution Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next build log to distribution loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Indie teams frequently have raw progress but do not package it into attention-generating narratives.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Indie teams frequently have raw progress but do not package it into attention-generating narratives.

raw_candidates.label: Task Queue Clearing Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for reducing backlog pressure by clustering, sequencing, and escalating the right tasks each day.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated task queue clearing loop workflow inside the builder productivity systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Task Queue Clearing Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next task queue clearing loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Knowledge workers often need help deciding what to clear first, not just tracking more tasks.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Knowledge workers often need help deciding what to clear first, not just tracking more tasks.

raw_candidates.label: Career Signal Compounding Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for turning repeated work outputs into visible career signals that compound over time.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated career signal compounding loop workflow inside the career / status / social proof wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Career Signal Compounding Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next career signal compounding loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Career progress increasingly depends on public proof and discoverable signal, not just private competence.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Career progress increasingly depends on public proof and discoverable signal, not just private competence.

cluster_packets.focus: Recurring life-admin, shopping, travel, local decision, and personal coordination loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Consumer Agent Utilities. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring life-admin, shopping, travel, local decision, and personal coordination loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Personal CFO Loop
raw_candidates.description: A consumer utility for recurring money oversight across cash flow, subscriptions, bills, and tradeoffs.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated personal cfo loop workflow inside the consumer agent utilities wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Personal CFO Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next personal cfo loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People want a more agentic money-ops layer, not just passive budgeting dashboards.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People want a more agentic money-ops layer, not just passive budgeting dashboards.

Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Money Admin Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for clearing recurring financial chores such as renewals, reimbursements, cancellations, and bill review.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated money admin loop workflow inside the consumer agent utilities wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Money Admin Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next money admin loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A large share of daily money pain is mundane admin work rather than strategic planning.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A large share of daily money pain is mundane admin work rather than strategic planning.

raw_candidates.label: Consumer Utility Stack
raw_candidates.description: A bundle-style utility layer for recurring personal operations such as appointments, subscriptions, errands, and reminders.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated consumer utility stack workflow inside the consumer agent utilities wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Consumer Utility Stack outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next consumer utility stack move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Many consumers want useful agentic help for ordinary friction, not more novelty demos.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Many consumers want useful agentic help for ordinary friction, not more novelty demos.

raw_candidates.label: Crypto Airdrop Hunting Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for tracking, qualifying, and executing repeated airdrop participation opportunities across ecosystems.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated crypto airdrop hunting loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Crypto Airdrop Hunting Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next crypto airdrop hunting loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Crypto users repeatedly chase fragmented airdrop opportunities with ad hoc spreadsheets and memory.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Crypto users repeatedly chase fragmented airdrop opportunities with ad hoc spreadsheets and memory.

raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make DeFi Yield Rotation Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles

raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Yield opportunities move quickly, and the cost of slow comparison is materially lost return.

raw_candidates.label: Identity Proof Loop
raw_candidates.description: A creator workflow for packaging receipts, wins, and artifacts into repeated proof-of-skill moments.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated identity proof loop workflow inside the x-native persona tools wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Identity Proof Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next identity proof loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: X-native audiences respond strongly when creators repeatedly show evidence that they actually do the thing they talk about.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: X-native audiences respond strongly when creators repeatedly show evidence that they actually do the thing they talk about.

raw_candidates.label: Status Signal Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for shaping posts and artifacts that communicate taste, sharpness, and relevance to internet-native audiences.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated status signal loop workflow inside the x-native persona tools wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Status Signal Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next status signal loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People on X often share content not just because it is useful, but because it upgrades how they are perceived.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People on X often share content not just because it is useful, but because it upgrades how they are perceived.

raw_candidates.label: Trend to Thesis Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for turning fast-moving trends into distinct creator theses, takes, and packaged contrarian positions.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated trend to thesis loop workflow inside the x-native persona tools wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Trend to Thesis Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next trend to thesis loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Winning accounts often turn a noisy trend into a sharp thesis before the rest of the feed catches up.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Winning accounts often turn a noisy trend into a sharp thesis before the rest of the feed catches up.

raw_candidates.label: Remix Meme Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for translating live memes and cultural formats into on-brand creator variations quickly enough to matter.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated remix meme loop workflow inside the design / remix / aesthetics wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Remix Meme Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next remix meme loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: The shelf life of internet meme formats is short, so creators need a lightweight remix engine instead of bespoke brainstorming.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: The shelf life of internet meme formats is short, so creators need a lightweight remix engine instead of bespoke brainstorming.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 2 for Design / Remix / Aesthetics. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Design Feedback Loop
raw_candidates.description: A creator-system for collecting, clustering, and acting on aesthetic feedback across posts, pages, and product drops.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated design feedback loop workflow inside the design / remix / aesthetics wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Design Feedback Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next design feedback loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Visual taste-driven accounts iterate in public, but the signal from replies and DMs is usually lost.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Visual taste-driven accounts iterate in public, but the signal from replies and DMs is usually lost.

raw_candidates.label: Language Output Drill Loop
raw_candidates.description: A recurring practice loop that pushes language learners to produce spoken or written output in short, escalating drills.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated language output drill loop workflow inside the education / skill acceleration wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Language Output Drill Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next language output drill loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People improve languages faster when they repeatedly output under pressure, but most apps still overweight passive review.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People improve languages faster when they repeatedly output under pressure, but most apps still overweight passive review.

raw_candidates.label: Tutorial Sprint Lab
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for compressing a long tutorial into short build-and-test sprints that preserve momentum and visible skill gain.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated tutorial sprint lab workflow inside the education / skill acceleration wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Tutorial Sprint Lab outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next tutorial sprint lab move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of ambitious learners buy courses or bookmark tutorials but stall because the path from watching to doing is too loose.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of ambitious learners buy courses or bookmark tutorials but stall because the path from watching to doing is too loose.

raw_candidates.label: Interview Story Rehearsal Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for repeatedly practicing achievement stories, behavioral answers, and delivery patterns until they feel sharp and natural.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated interview story rehearsal loop workflow inside the education / skill acceleration wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Interview Story Rehearsal Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next interview story rehearsal loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Interview performance often improves through repeated narrative rehearsal, not by collecting more generic advice.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Interview performance often improves through repeated narrative rehearsal, not by collecting more generic advice.

raw_candidates.label: Workout Streak Proof Loop
raw_candidates.description: A recurring accountability system that turns workouts into visible streaks, evidence, and next-session preparation.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated workout streak proof loop workflow inside the health / fitness / self systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Workout Streak Proof Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next workout streak proof loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Fitness adherence improves when people can see and share repeated proof that they are still in motion.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Fitness adherence improves when people can see and share repeated proof that they are still in motion.

Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Meal Prep Adherence Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for planning, prepping, and reviewing meals around what people actually stick to rather than idealized plans.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated meal prep adherence loop workflow inside the health / fitness / self systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Meal Prep Adherence Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next meal prep adherence loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Nutrition plans fail less from knowledge gaps than from the lack of a repeatable adherence loop that fits real life.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Nutrition plans fail less from knowledge gaps than from the lack of a repeatable adherence loop that fits real life.

raw_candidates.label: Sleep Recovery Feedback Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for adjusting bedtime, training load, and daily intensity based on repeated recovery signals.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated sleep recovery feedback loop workflow inside the health / fitness / self systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Sleep Recovery Feedback Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next sleep recovery feedback loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People increasingly treat recovery as an operating metric, but most still lack a lightweight loop that turns sleep data into action.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People increasingly treat recovery as an operating metric, but most still lack a lightweight loop that turns sleep data into action.

raw_candidates.label: Opener Iteration Loop
raw_candidates.description: A dating workflow for testing message openers, reviewing response patterns, and refining the next wave quickly.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated opener iteration loop workflow inside the dating / social signal wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Opener Iteration Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next opener iteration loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People keep trying new openers in dating apps, but almost never turn that into a real feedback loop.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People keep trying new openers in dating apps, but almost never turn that into a real feedback loop.

raw_candidates.label: Date Debrief Loop
raw_candidates.description: A repeated reflection and follow-up loop for learning from dates, spotting patterns, and improving future conversations.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated date debrief loop workflow inside the dating / social signal wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Date Debrief Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next date debrief loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of social progress comes from honest debriefs after interactions, but most people do not preserve those lessons.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of social progress comes from honest debriefs after interactions, but most people do not preserve those lessons.

raw_candidates.label: City Weekend Stack Loop
raw_candidates.description: A local planning loop for assembling repeatable weekend combinations of food, events, and social spots.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated city weekend stack loop workflow inside the local discovery / experiences wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make City Weekend Stack Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles

raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People keep asking the same question every weekend: what is the best stack of things to do without wasting time deciding.

raw_candidates.label: Community Ritual Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for creating repeatable rituals, memes, and recurring prompts that keep an audience returning and participating.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated community ritual loop workflow inside the fandom / collectibles / communities wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Community Ritual Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next community ritual loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Communities get sticky when they develop their own rituals, but creators rarely design those rituals intentionally.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Communities get sticky when they develop their own rituals, but creators rarely design those rituals intentionally.

raw_candidates.label: Paycheck Allocation Loop
raw_candidates.description: A personal finance workflow that routes each paycheck into repeated allocations across bills, saving, and conviction bets.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated paycheck allocation loop workflow inside the finance / money ops wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Paycheck Allocation Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next paycheck allocation loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of money management pain happens right when income lands and people have to re-decide the split every time.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of money management pain happens right when income lands and people have to re-decide the split every time.

raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Subscription Prune Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles

Reject vague workflows, personas, and generic tooling before canonicalization.
